interaction.prompt: You're F3, trailing the rush. Draw your path to the best support position.

feedback.right: Trail high, top of the slot — you're shot support AND backcheck coverage if it turns over.
feedback.wrong: You drifted into the play. Trail high through the middle so you read the next layer.

tip: Trail high — through the middle to the top of the slot gives you shot support AND backcheck coverage if it turns over.
why: F3 is the safety on offense. Top of the slot covers a rebound shot, sets up a high screen, and lets you peel back if the puck turns over.
